Gentle grasping technique with instrument tips
Using empty bucket in middle for workspace management
Controlled camera movement to prevent disorientation
verbal_cues: Grab the marble gently with the tip of your instrument

Follow the controller with your scope
Drop the marble above the bucket
Moving the camera too fast or uncontrolled will result in misorientation or dizziness
common_errors_addressed: Moving instruments too quickly causing collision damage
Uncontrolled camera movements leading to disorientation
